options.name: <llx>
options.description: lower left x coordinate of the bounding box

options.name: <lly>
options.description: lower left y coordinate of the bounding box

options.name: <urx>
options.description: upper right x coordinate of the bounding box

options.name: <ury>
options.description: upper right y coordinate of the bounding box

options.name: <attr>
options.description: attribute of the routing blockage, {Undefined|Fills|Slots|Partial Pushdown EXCEPTPGNET|PGNETONLY|ALLNET}

options.name: <spacing>
options.description: minimum spacing between layers within the routing blockage or effective width of the routing blockage {-spacing | -designRuleWidth}
